resposta:
solution: class Solution:
    def grayCode(self, n: int) -> List[int]:
        return [i ^ (i >> 1) for i in range(1 << n)]
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(2^n)
space complexity: O(2^n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses the standard binary-reflected Gray code formula g(i)=i⊕(i>>1) to generate the sequence in one pass. Minimal computation and memory usage.
